for my favorite person

Hey Frances,
I made you this

Just a little corner of the internet to tell you a few things scroll down whenever you're ready. 💌

keep scrolling ↓
before anything else

A appreciation Message For My baby

Love thank you sa chance na binigay mo sakin, thank you dahil kahit papano ay nabalik ko yung trust mo sakin alam kong sobrang mali ng pinag-gagawa ko before but i already surrender all of it God and promised him na ill do better love and thank you u came to my life my love im very sorry sa mga nangyari sana mabalik ko na yung tiwala mo sakin my loves promise di ko sasayangin yung chance na to baby thank you love your always here with me and always support me in anything sana baby diak na mabother and balik balikan ng nganangyayari im so worried about your feelings and di ko kaya na wala ka sa buhay ko I love you so muchhh babyyy kooo!!!

this one's my favorite
okay, here goes

Will you go out with me tommorow buy shawarma?

my treat, no pressure or anything 👀 (okay maybe a little)

made with 💗 just for you
She said yes!! 🎉

best decision you've made I love youuu!!
